MissingGoal.recommendation: Give this character a clear objective to drive their actions.

MissingMotivation.title: Character may feel shallow
MissingMotivation.reason: Character has goals but lacks underlying motivations explaining why they want them.

ConnectedNetwork.title: Connected Character Network
ConnectedNetwork.description: The story features an interconnected web of character relationships.

ActiveArcs.title: Active Character Arcs
ActiveArcs.description: Multiple characters have clearly defined goals driving the plot forward.

IsolatedCharacters.title: Characters are isolated
IsolatedCharacters.description: There are no relationships defined between characters in the story.
